subtopic: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies
title: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies: A trader holds a long position in a futures contract....
summary: Assess the impact on a long futures position when the underlying price decreases.
prompt: A trader holds a long position in a futures contract. If the market price of the asset decreases, what happens to their position?

options.text: A long position in a futures contract results in losses if the market price of

solution: A long position in a futures contract results in losses if the market price of the asset decreases, as the trader is obligated to buy at a higher price. [[24]]
